ddls:
CREATE TABLE "loan_status" (
  "loan_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan status record. */,
  "dti_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the DTI category. */,
  "loan_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the loan type. */,
  "charged_off_count" INTEGER /* Count of loans that have been charged off. */,
  "fully_paid_count" INTEGER /* Count of loans that have been fully paid. */,
  "total_loans" INTEGER /* Total number of loans in the category. */,
  "charged_off_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of loans that have been charged off. */,
  "total_loan_amount" REAL /* Total amount of loans in the category. */,
  "average_loan_amount" REAL /* Average amount of loans in the category. */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the record. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loan_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_status_dti_id FOREIGN KEY ("dti_id") REFERENCES dti_categories ("dti_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_status_loan_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_type_id") REFERENCES loan_types ("loan_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dti_categories" (
  "dti_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each DTI category. */,
  "dti_range" TEXT /* Range of DTI values (e.g., 0-5, 5-10). */,
  "min_dti" REAL /* Minimum DTI value for the category. */,
  "max_dti" REAL /* Maximum DTI value for the category. */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the DTI category. */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the category was created. */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the category. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dti_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_types" (
  "loan_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan type. */,
  "loan_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the loan type (e.g., Personal Loan, Mortgage). */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the loan type. */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Average interest rate for the loan type. */,
  "term_length" INTEGER /* Average term length for the loan type. */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the loan type was created. */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the loan type. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loan_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan application. */,
  "loan_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of loan applied for. */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the applicant. */,
  "dti_percentage" REAL /* Debt-to-income percentage of the applicant. */,
  "loan_amount" REAL /* The amount of the loan applied for. */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* The interest rate for the loan. */,
  "term_length" INTEGER /* The term length for the loan. */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date the application was submitted. */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the application (e.g., Approved, Denied). */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date the application was approved (if applicable). */,
  "denial_reason" TEXT /* Reason for denial (if applicable). */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the application was submitted. */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the application. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_applications_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES applicants ("applicant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_applications_loan_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_type_id") REFERENCES loan_types ("loan_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applicants" (
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each applicant. */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the applicant. */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the applicant. */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the applicant. */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the applicant. */,
  "income" REAL /* Annual income of the applicant. */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the applicant. */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the applicant. */,
  "credit_score" INTEGER /* Credit score of the applicant. */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status of the applicant. */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the applicant was added to the system. */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the applicant's record. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk assessment. */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the loan application being assessed. */,
  "risk_score" REAL /* Calculated risk score of the application. */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the assessor. */,
  "date_assessed" TEXT /* Date the assessment was conducted. */,
  "assessor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who conducted the assessment. */,
  "assessor_comments" TEXT /* Additional comments from the assessor. */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the assessment was conducted. */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the assessment. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_assessments_assessor_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_assessments_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES loan_applications ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "repayment_history" (
  "repayment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each repayment record. */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the loan associated with the repayment. */,
  "repayment_date" TEXT /* Date of the repayment. */,
  "amount_paid" REAL /* Amount paid in this repayment. */,
  "outstanding_balance" REAL /* Remaining balance after the repayment. */,
  "repayment_method" TEXT /* Method of repayment (e.g., automatic deduction, manual payment). */,
  "late_fee" REAL /* Amount of any late fees applied. */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the repayment record was created. */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the repayment record. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("repayment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_repayment_history_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loan_applications ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document. */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the loan application the document is related to. */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., identification, income statement). */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document. */,
  "document_size" INTEGER /* Size of the document in bytes. */,
  "document_status" TEXT /* Status of the document (e.g., uploaded, verified, rejected). */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded. */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the document was uploaded. */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the document. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_documents_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES loan_applications ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user. */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user. */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security. */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin). */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user. */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user. */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user. */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login. */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created. */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry. */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the system. */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred. */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken by the user (e.g., login, view report). */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user when accessing the system. */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser. */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the log entry was created. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
